monitor_the_situation.title: — S4 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 5h ago. The Palestinian Health Ministry reports the death toll from Israel's military campaign in Gaza has risen to 73,246, with thousands more wounded.

— S3 · Disaster · Hermel, Lebanon · 35m ago. A gas tanker exploded after a fire sparked by soaring temperatures near the Lebanese Army barracks in Hermel, damaging homes and vehicles.
US Strikes Kill Dozens in Iran, Iran Targets Regional Bases

— S3 · Conflict · Iran · 1h ago. US attacks have killed dozens in Iran, while Iranian forces retaliated by targeting regional bases, pushing a fragile ceasefire closer to collapse amid escalating tensions.
